fa-baseball.appearanceId: round sphere with two curved stitching seams forming a figure-eight pattern; circular ball with red arc stitches on opposite sides
fa-baseball.functionalityId: tags or labels an item as baseball-related; marks content belonging to the baseball sport category
fa-baseball.intentId: associate content with baseball sports; browse or filter baseball-themed items

fa-baseball-bat-ball.appearanceId: diagonal cylindrical bat with a round sphere near the barrel end; elongated club shape positioned beside a stitched ball
fa-baseball-bat-ball.functionalityId: tags content as baseball activity; indicates a batting or hitting interaction
fa-baseball-bat-ball.intentId: navigate to baseball sport content; access bat-and-ball game features

fa-basket-shopping.appearanceId: open woven basket with a curved handle arching over the top; round-bottomed carrier with a looped grip
fa-basket-shopping.functionalityId: opens the shopping cart or basket; displays items selected for purchase
fa-basket-shopping.intentId: review collected items before checkout; manage goods added to a shopping session

fa-basket-shopping-minus.appearanceId: open basket with a handle and a minus symbol below or beside it; shopping carrier with a subtraction indicator
fa-basket-shopping-minus.functionalityId: removes an item from the shopping basket; decreases the quantity of a selected product
fa-basket-shopping-minus.intentId: take a product out of the current cart; reduce the number of items being purchased

fa-basket-shopping-plus.appearanceId: open basket with a handle and a plus symbol below or beside it; shopping carrier with an addition indicator
fa-basket-shopping-plus.functionalityId: adds an item to the shopping basket; increases the quantity of a selected product
fa-basket-shopping-plus.intentId: place a product into the current cart; add more of an item to the purchase

fa-basketball.appearanceId: round sphere with curved parallel lines and a vertical seam dividing it into panels; circular ball with arcing groove lines
fa-basketball.functionalityId: tags or filters content as basketball-related; marks items belonging to the basketball sport category
fa-basketball.intentId: browse basketball sport content; navigate to basketball-themed features

fa-basketball-hoop.appearanceId: horizontal ring with a hanging net below it, mounted on a rectangular backboard; circular rim with a mesh basket attached
fa-basketball-hoop.functionalityId: navigates to basketball game or scoring features; marks content related to hoops or goal scoring
fa-basketball-hoop.intentId: access basketball court or game tracking; view scoring or goal-related sports content

fa-bat.appearanceId: flying mammal silhouette with outstretched wings and pointed ears; spread-winged creature with a rounded body and angular wing membranes
fa-bat.functionalityId: labels content as Halloween or nocturnal themed; tags items with a bat animal or spooky category
fa-bat.intentId: navigate to Halloween or dark-theme content; apply a spooky or nature animal tag

fa-bath.appearanceId: rectangular tub profile with slanted back and two small feet beneath; side-view outline of a bathtub with a faucet end
fa-bath.functionalityId: marks a room or amenity as containing a bathtub; filters accommodations or facilities by bathing availability
fa-bath.intentId: find a bathroom or bathing facility; indicate that a space includes a full bathtub

fa-battery.appearanceId: horizontal rectangle representing a battery casing with a small nub terminal on the right end; outlined battery cell with a positive cap
fa-battery.functionalityId: displays current battery charge level; shows remaining power percentage
fa-battery.intentId: check how much battery life remains; monitor device power status

fa-battery-0.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with an empty interior and a small terminal nub; completely hollow battery rectangle
fa-battery-0.functionalityId: warns that battery charge is critically low; alerts user to connect to power immediately
fa-battery-0.intentId: recognize that the device has no remaining charge; take action to recharge before shutdown

fa-battery-1.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with a very thin filled segment on the left inside; battery rectangle with roughly one-quarter fill
fa-battery-1.functionalityId: indicates battery charge is very low; warns that power is nearly depleted
fa-battery-1.intentId: see that the device needs charging soon; act before power runs out

fa-battery-2.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with a partially filled interior reaching about halfway; battery rectangle with roughly half fill
fa-battery-2.functionalityId: shows battery charge at approximately half capacity; displays moderate remaining power
fa-battery-2.intentId: gauge remaining battery life at a midpoint level; decide whether to charge the device

fa-battery-3.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with interior fill reaching about three-quarters; battery rectangle mostly filled with a small empty gap on the right
fa-battery-3.functionalityId: indicates battery charge is above half and still healthy; displays a mostly-charged power level
fa-battery-3.intentId: confirm the device has adequate battery remaining; see that charging is not yet urgent

fa-battery-4.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with fully filled interior and a small terminal nub; completely solid battery rectangle
fa-battery-4.functionalityId: shows battery is fully charged; confirms power is at maximum capacity
fa-battery-4.intentId: verify the device is completely charged; confirm no further charging is needed

fa-battery-bolt.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with a lightning bolt shape inside the cell; battery rectangle containing a zigzag flash symbol
fa-battery-bolt.functionalityId: indicates the device is actively charging; shows that power is currently being supplied
fa-battery-bolt.intentId: confirm a charging connection is active; monitor that the battery is receiving power

fa-battery-car.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with a small car silhouette inside; battery cell containing an automobile shape
fa-battery-car.functionalityId: indicates vehicle battery or car power status; shows automotive power level or EV charge
fa-battery-car.intentId: check a car or electric vehicle battery charge; monitor automotive power system status

fa-battery-exclamation.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline with an exclamation mark inside the cell; battery rectangle containing a warning punctuation symbol
fa-battery-exclamation.functionalityId: warns of a battery error or fault condition; alerts user to a problem with power or charging
fa-battery-exclamation.intentId: investigate a battery malfunction or alert; address a power-related warning

fa-battery-slash.appearanceId: horizontal battery outline crossed by a diagonal slash line; battery rectangle with a line cutting through it
fa-battery-slash.functionalityId: indicates battery is disabled or unavailable; shows that power functionality has been turned off
fa-battery-slash.intentId: disable or ignore battery monitoring; acknowledge that battery tracking is not active

fa-bed.appearanceId: side-view profile of a bed frame with a pillow on the mattress; rectangular sleeping surface with a headboard on one end
fa-bed.functionalityId: marks a space or listing as having sleeping accommodations; filters options by bedroom availability
fa-bed.intentId: find a place to sleep or rest; browse accommodation listings that include a bed

fa-bed-alt.appearanceId: simplified side-view bed outline with a raised headboard and flat platform; streamlined sleeping furniture profile
fa-bed-alt.functionalityId: indicates an alternative or additional bed option; marks a secondary sleeping space
fa-bed-alt.intentId: find an alternative sleeping arrangement; select a different bed type for an accommodation

fa-bed-bunk.appearanceId: side-view of two stacked bed frames with a ladder on one side; double-decker sleeping structure with rungs
fa-bed-bunk.functionalityId: indicates bunk bed sleeping arrangements; marks accommodations with stacked beds
fa-bed-bunk.intentId: find shared or multi-person sleeping rooms; select accommodations with bunk beds

fa-bed-empty.appearanceId: side-view bed frame with a flat mattress and no pillow or occupant; bare sleeping surface profile
fa-bed-empty.functionalityId: indicates an unoccupied or available bed; marks a sleeping space as currently free
fa-bed-empty.intentId: identify a vacant bed or room; check availability of sleeping accommodations

fa-bed-pulse.appearanceId: side-view bed profile with a heart-rate or pulse waveform line above it; sleeping surface with a medical monitor line
fa-bed-pulse.functionalityId: indicates patient monitoring or hospital bed status; shows a medical or vital-sign tracking context
fa-bed-pulse.intentId: access patient care or medical bed management; monitor health status of a resting individual

fa-bee.appearanceId: small insect silhouette with oval body, striped abdomen, and two pairs of wings; flying bug with antennae and wing pairs spread outward
fa-bee.functionalityId: tags content related to bees or nature; marks items in an ecology or beekeeping category
fa-bee.intentId: navigate to nature or pollinator content; apply a bee or insect theme label

fa-beer.appearanceId: tall mug silhouette with a handle on one side and a foamy top; cylindrical drinking vessel with bubbles at the rim
fa-beer.functionalityId: tags content as beer or alcohol related; marks a venue or item as serving beer
fa-beer.intentId: find beer or pub-related content; filter venues or products by beer availability

fa-beer-mug.appearanceId: large mug with a thick handle and a frothy overflowing top; heavy-sided tankard with foam spilling over the rim
fa-beer-mug.functionalityId: labels a location or listing as a beer venue; indicates beer-related products or services
fa-beer-mug.intentId: browse bars or brewery offerings; find beer-serving establishments or products

fa-bell.appearanceId: rounded bell shape with a domed top and a small clapper or base at the bottom; symmetrical bell silhouette with a hanging curve
fa-bell.functionalityId: opens notification panel or alert center; indicates that new alerts or messages are available
fa-bell.intentId: check pending notifications or alerts; access the notification center

fa-bell-concierge.appearanceId: small dome service bell with a button on top sitting on a flat base; rounded concierge call bell silhouette
fa-bell-concierge.functionalityId: requests assistance or customer service; calls for help or a service attendant
fa-bell-concierge.intentId: summon help or a service representative; request concierge or hospitality assistance

fa-bell-exclamation.appearanceId: bell silhouette with an exclamation mark overlaid or attached; notification bell with a warning punctuation symbol
fa-bell-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to an urgent notification; highlights a critical or unread alert
fa-bell-exclamation.intentId: review an important or urgent alert; address a high-priority notification

fa-bell-on.appearanceId: bell silhouette with small motion lines or sound waves indicating it is ringing; active bell with vibration marks
fa-bell-on.functionalityId: enables or activates notifications; turns on alert delivery for a channel or topic
fa-bell-on.intentId: turn on notifications for an item or account; ensure alerts will be received going forward

fa-bell-plus.appearanceId: bell silhouette with a plus sign overlaid or attached at the base; notification bell with an addition symbol
fa-bell-plus.functionalityId: subscribes to or adds a new notification; creates a new alert or notification rule
fa-bell-plus.intentId: sign up for notifications on a topic; add a new alert subscription

fa-bell-ring.appearanceId: bell silhouette tilted slightly with arc lines on both sides indicating ringing; swinging bell with sound radiation marks
fa-bell-ring.functionalityId: triggers or plays a notification sound; indicates an active ringing alert
fa-bell-ring.intentId: hear or respond to an incoming notification; acknowledge a ringing alert

fa-bell-school.appearanceId: bell shape styled as a school or church tower bell with a sturdy base; traditional hanging bell with a wide lower opening
fa-bell-school.functionalityId: indicates a school schedule event or class change; marks a bell-based timing or timetable feature
fa-bell-school.intentId: view school timetable or period transitions; track class bell or schedule events

fa-bell-school-slash.appearanceId: school bell silhouette crossed by a diagonal slash line; bell shape with a line cutting through it
fa-bell-school-slash.functionalityId: indicates school is out or bell notifications are muted; disables school bell or schedule alerts
fa-bell-school-slash.intentId: mute school-related notification sounds; indicate no school or class in session

fa-bell-slash.appearanceId: bell silhouette crossed by a diagonal slash line; notification bell with a line cutting through it
fa-bell-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables notifications; turns off alert delivery for a channel or topic
fa-bell-slash.intentId: stop receiving notifications for an item; silence alerts from a source

fa-bells.appearanceId: two bell shapes side by side, each with a small clapper; pair of rounded bells grouped together
fa-bells.functionalityId: indicates festive or celebratory alerts; marks a holiday or event notification context
fa-bells.intentId: access holiday or celebration-themed notifications; mark an event with a festive bell theme

fa-bench-tree.appearanceId: horizontal flat bench seat with legs beneath it next to a tree trunk with a rounded canopy; park bench silhouette beside a leafy tree
fa-bench-tree.functionalityId: marks a park, outdoor, or rest area location; identifies a seating area in a green space
fa-bench-tree.intentId: find a nearby park or outdoor rest area; identify a public green space with seating

fa-betamax.appearanceId: rectangular cassette tape body with two circular reels visible through a window cutout; vintage video tape cartridge silhouette
fa-betamax.functionalityId: tags content as retro or legacy video media; indicates vintage or archive video format
fa-betamax.intentId: access or label vintage video archive content; browse retro media collections

fa-bezier-curve.appearanceId: smooth S-shaped or arching curve with anchor points and control handles at each end; vector path line with two tangent handle arms
fa-bezier-curve.functionalityId: activates the bezier or pen path drawing tool; edits vector curve control points
fa-bezier-curve.intentId: draw or adjust a smooth vector curve; modify a path's shape using control handles

fa-bible.appearanceId: closed book with a cross embossed on the cover; rectangular book silhouette with a cross symbol on the front
fa-bible.functionalityId: opens or links to religious scripture content; marks items with a biblical or religious category
fa-bible.intentId: read or access biblical or religious texts; navigate to faith-related content

fa-bicycle.appearanceId: side-view bicycle silhouette with two equal wheels, frame, handlebars, and seat; two-wheeled human-powered vehicle profile
fa-bicycle.functionalityId: indicates cycling directions or bike routes; marks a bicycle parking or rental location
fa-bicycle.intentId: find cycling routes or bike-friendly paths; locate a bicycle rental or parking spot

fa-biking.appearanceId: figure of a person riding a bicycle in side-view profile; human silhouette pedaling a two-wheeled cycle
fa-biking.functionalityId: indicates an active cycling activity or workout; marks bike-related fitness or recreation
fa-biking.intentId: track a cycling workout or activity; browse bike riding or fitness content

fa-biking-mountain.appearanceId: person on a bicycle with a jagged mountain silhouette in the background; cyclist figure beside a peaked mountain outline
fa-biking-mountain.functionalityId: indicates mountain biking trails or off-road cycling; marks rugged terrain bike activity
fa-biking-mountain.intentId: find mountain bike trails or off-road routes; track an outdoor cycling adventure

fa-billboard.appearanceId: large flat rectangular panel elevated on two posts or legs; wide display board silhouette on a tall support structure
fa-billboard.functionalityId: displays an advertisement or public announcement; marks a promotional or signage element
fa-billboard.intentId: view or manage an advertising campaign; place or review a public announcement

fa-bin-bottles.appearanceId: rectangular bin or container with bottle outlines inside or beside it; waste receptacle silhouette with bottle shapes
fa-bin-bottles.functionalityId: marks a bottle collection or disposal point; indicates a container for bottle storage

fa-bin-bottles-recycle.functionalityId: marks a bottle recycling drop-off point; indicates a recycling bin for bottles

fa-bin-recycle.appearanceId: rectangular bin or container with a circular recycling arrow symbol on it; waste receptacle with a three-arrow recycle emblem
fa-bin-recycle.functionalityId: marks a recycling bin or disposal point; indicates where recyclable materials should be placed
